identities.logic: Targeting piecewise functions where limit exists but f(a) is undefined. Recurrent in 2021/2022/2023 papers.
Application of f(x) = f(a+b-x) in trigonometric integrals. High frequency in Section B.

Combining sin^-1 and cos^-1 properties with algebraic constraints.
det(adj A) = |A|^(n-1). Standard KCET efficiency shortcut.
Properties of (A+A') as symmetric and (A-A') as skew-symmetric.

Linear first-order equations with IF = e^(integral P dx). High frequency in calculus section.

Relationship between e and b^2/a^2 for rectangular vs standard hyperbolas.
Sum and product of cube roots of unity (1+w+w^2=0). Recurring algebraic shortcut.

dy/dx for x=f(t), y=g(t). Targeting second-order d^2y/dx^2 traps.
